name: mcpwp
description: Connect Claude Desktop to any WordPress site. Manage posts, pages, Elementor, WooCommerce, SEO, media, and more — with human approval gates.
long_description:
MCPWP is the MCP operator layer for WordPress. It connects Claude Desktop to your WordPress sites via the Model Context Protocol, giving Claude 200+ tools to read and write content, manage Elementor pages, run SEO audits, handle WooCommerce products and orders, upload media, and more.

**Key features:**
- 200+ WordPress tools across content, Elementor, WooCommerce, SEO, media, menus, and settings
- Human approval gates — destructive actions require explicit confirmation before executing
- Agent playbooks — reusable multi-step workflows (full-site audit, SEO fix, page build)
- Elementor page builder support — read and write visual page data
- WooCommerce — products, orders, customers, analytics
- SEO integrations — Yoast, RankMath, AIOSEO, SEOPress
- Forms — Contact Form 7, WPForms, Gravity Forms
- AI-native onboarding — Claude learns your site on first connect

**Requirements:** WordPress 5.9+ with the MCPWP plugin installed and activated.

Get the plugin: https://mcpwp.net

wp_url.title: WordPress Site URL
wp_url.description: The URL of your WordPress site (e.g. https://example.com)

wp_api_key.title: MCPWP API Key
wp_api_key.description: Generate your API key in WP Admin → MCPWP → Setup

prompts.name: onboard_site
prompts.description: Get a full overview of the connected WordPress site
prompts.text: Please onboard me to this WordPress site. Call wp_onboard to get a complete site briefing including content inventory, active integrations, and recommended first actions.

prompts.name: seo_audit
prompts.description: Run a full SEO audit on the connected site
prompts.text: Run a full SEO audit on this WordPress site. Check all pages and posts for SEO issues, missing meta descriptions, and optimization opportunities. Use wp_seo_audit_site and wp_get_seo_issues.

prompts.name: content_graph
prompts.description: Map internal linking opportunities across the site
prompts.text: Analyze the internal linking structure of this WordPress site. Use wp_get_content_graph and wp_suggest_internal_links to find linking opportunities that can improve SEO and user navigation.
